message: Document nightly start steps for agents

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+# Agent Notes
+
+- When asked to run/start the nightly, build via `Scripts/package_app.sh release`, install to `/Applications/CodexBar.app` (rsync --delete), kill any existing CodexBar process, then relaunch with `open -n /Applications/CodexBar.app`.
